coachAM: Your recurring journal entries about "procrastination, laziness" and the stark absence of evening reflection entries reveal a critical breakdown in your daily close-out, directly correlating to your abysmal Sleep, Training, and Sovereign Morning metrics; you're not just failing to execute, you're failing to prepare for the next day's execution, constantly chasing the day instead of commanding it. The root cause is a catastrophic collapse in your discipline of *finishing*, which bleeds into every facet of your spiritual and physical readiness, eroding the very foundation required to operate at an elite level and fundamentally compromising your ability to embody the "best worker, best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency" you claim to desire. Tonight, execute your Reflection — AM Intention + PM Review habit, specifically using the PM Review to outline tomorrow's #1 priority and your exact sleep window.
